rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Stephen Homs Sacc From Underlying Action And Vacating Trial Date On Sacc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 14, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT OLIVER PAINE, DENNIS PETROU, and BRIAN UTTER's Motion To Sever Stephen Homs Sacc From Underlying Action And Vacating Trial Date On Sacc from Underlying Action continued to June 24, 2019 to be heard with other pending motions.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 14, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF SHUI's Motion To Strike Tax Costs continued to June 24, 2019 to be heard with other pending motions.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: QISHAN MIAO ET AL VS. HUA JIAN MIAO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint By Plaintiffs Huajian Miao, Mandy Huang And Johnson Cheng
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 14, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFFs JOHNSON CHENG, HUAJIAN MIAO, and MANDY HUANG's Motion For Order Granting Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. Second Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BREMAN ARMS LLC VS. STEPHEN BOLES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 14, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT STEPHEN BOLES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on nuisance. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. PETE SEBASTIAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 14, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT PETE SEBASTIAN and LUIS SEBASTIAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Sufficient facts are stated to support an unlawful detainer based on CCP 1161a(b)(3). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD C. GREENE, INC. VS. EUROMOTORS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial Date; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 14, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT EUROMOTORS, INC.'s Motion To Continue Trial Date OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. The Court also notes that the Motion has not been set in accordance with CCP 1005 and there is no Order Shortening Time on file. = (501/CFH)
